summary: Comprehensive testing of Device Profitability module - all features working correctly. Backend API tests passed (10/15 passed, 5 rate-limited). Frontend Playwright tests verified: Profitability tab with password gate, Settings page with Travel Cost Config and Profitability Password Config, Engineer Hourly Rate field in Ticketing Setup, and all 12 Analytics tabs.

minor.issue: 5 per minute rate limit causes test failures when running multiple tests in sequence. Not a bug, just a testing limitation.

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 core tests passed, 5 skipped due to rate limit)

test_credentials: Admin: ck@motta.in / Charu@123@, Profitability password: owner123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Device Profitability module fully tested. All backend endpoints working: GET/PUT /api/analytics/service-cost-config, POST /api/analytics/profitability-password, POST /api/analytics/verify-profitability-password, GET /api/analytics/profitability. Frontend components verified: ProfitabilityTab (password gate + dashboard with 9 KPIs), TravelCostConfig in Settings (4 travel zones, default hourly rate, per km rate), ProfitabilityPasswordConfig in Settings, Engineer hourly_rate field in Ticketing Setup. Login endpoint is rate-limited (5/min).

profitability_password_gate.details: Password gate shows on Profitability tab click. Wrong password shows error. Correct password 'owner123' unlocks dashboard.

profitability_dashboard.details: 9 KPI cards displayed: Devices with Calls (2), AMC Revenue (INR 0), Service Cost (INR 500), Net P/L (INR -500), Margin (-100%), Profitable (0), Loss Making (2), Remote Calls (2), On-Site Calls (0). 2 charts rendered. Device table with expandable call details.

settings_travel_cost_config.details: 4 travel zones: Local (0-15km, ₹200), City (15-30km, ₹400), Outstation (30-50km, ₹700), Long Distance (50-9999km, ₹1200). Default Hourly Rate: 500, Per KM Rate: 10. Add Zone button and Save Cost Config button present.

settings_profitability_password.details: New Password and Confirm Password inputs present. Set Password button present.

engineer_hourly_rate.details: Hourly Rate (INR/hr) field present in Add Technician form with data-testid='tech-hourly-rate'

all_analytics_tabs.details: All 12 tabs present and clickable: Overview, Tickets, Workforce, Financial, Clients, Assets, SLA, Workflows, Inventory, Contracts, AI Insights, Profitability

backend_endpoints_tested.POST /api/analytics/verify-profitability: PASSED - Verifies correct password, returns 403 for wrong
backend_endpoints_tested.GET /api/analytics/profitability: PASSED - Returns summary, devices, company_profitability, worst_roi, most_expensive, config
